territory.modules/home/email/aerc.nix: Phase 1 (rebind compose::review.y to ':send -a flat<Enter>'; delete the [hooks] mail-sent attrset) and Phase 3 (add [gmail] check-mail/check-mail-cmd/check-mail-timeout). Both COMPLETED.
territory.modules/home/services/mail-sync-timer.ni: Phase 2 (new module: oneshot service + timer running 'mail-sync both', modeled on cache-cleanup.nix). COMPLETED.
territory.modules/home/default.nix: Phase 2 (import ./services/mail-sync-timer.nix in the Service modules section). COMPLETED.

summary: Task 113 config implemented and build-verified. Phase 1: compose::review.y rebound to ':send -a flat<Enter>'; the uncommitted draft [hooks] mail-sent block deleted (confirmed absent from the generated aerc.conf). Phase 2: new modules/home/services/mail-sync-timer.nix (oneshot service + timer, OnCalendar='*:0/15', Persistent=true, After=graphical-session.target) created and imported into modules/home/default.nix's Service modules section; build output inspected directly from the Nix store and confirmed correct. Phase 3: [gmail] accounts.conf wired with check-mail=10m, check-mail-cmd='mail-sync gmail --no-wait', check-mail-timeout=30s (fixes the previously-broken 'u' keybind); [logos] left unwired per plan. Phase 4: 'home-manager build --flake .#benjamin' ran and exited 0 (8 derivations built). Phase 5 (live end-to-end reply->archive->sync->Gmail-web check) is PARTIAL/deferred to a manual user checklist recorded in the implementation summary -- no agent-driven TUI, mail-send, or mail-sync/mbsync live action was performed, per the plan's Non-Goals and orchestrator constraints.
next_command: user: home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin, then follow the manual verification checklist in specs/113_aerc_archive_on_reply_and_periodic_sync/summaries/01_archive-on-reply-periodic-sync-summary.md

verification.read_only_safe: systemctl --user list-timers / systemctl --user status mail-sync-timer.timer were NOT run by the agent -- no generation has been activated yet (build-only), so the new timer unit is not yet loaded into the running systemd --user session. Safe for the user to run after switch.
verification.forbidden_for_agent: Did NOT run home-manager switch, drive aerc's TUI, send real mail, or run mail-sync/mbsync against live servers. The reply->archive->sync->Gmail-web end-to-end check is recorded as a manual user checklist (Phase 5, PARTIAL).

commit_note: No commit was performed and nothing was left staged. The working tree holds intermingled uncommitted hunks (task 112 edits + the draft hook removal + this task's changes); committing is orchestrator-handled. NOTE: modules/home/services/mail-sync-timer.nix required a transient 'git add' / 'git reset HEAD' round-trip to get one green home-manager build (Nix flakes only evaluate git-tracked paths); it is confirmed back to untracked ('??') with nothing staged. Whoever runs the build again before the final commit will need to 'git add' the new file themselves first.
